title: SCBE coding agent Qwen Stage 6 repair v10 (slim signal-concentration)
description: v10 retry after v9 gate failed 1/5 (only stage6_unseen_hex_trace passed). v9 root cause: 216-row must_pass_boost was diluted by 4426-row total corpus (boost at 4.8%). v10 slims training to ONLY stage6 + stage6_repair + boost shards (594 rows total, boost at 36.4% — 7.5x concentration). All other v9 shards (drill_langues, codeflow, cross_tongue, command_lattice, binary_interpretation, geoseal_*) removed because they were teaching generalist Stage 6 prose patterns that overrode the boost's required-token signal. Inline gate against stage6_atomic_workflow_eval_contract.json blocks any HF push if score < 0.8 or any must_pass prompt fails.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Preserve token-to-binary/hex flow across code, semantic overlay, structural chemistry frame, and resource-aware workflow composition. Keep material chemistry separate from structural chemistry templates, predict resource overruns before commit, and use steady-state fallback plus re-advance when a launch would exceed budget.

evaluation.notes: Must clear the frozen Stage 6 unseen contract via the inline gate (render_uv_training_script in dispatch_coding_agent_hf_job.py). v10 tests the signal-concentration hypothesis: same boost shape as v9, but diluting shards removed so boost rises 4.8% -> 36.4% of train rows. If v10 still fails, v11 will add forced-prefix response shape per project_v9_gate_result.md.
